    1. invoke(int)

Interface Adl.AdlMallocCallback

All Superinterfaces:
AltCallingConvention, Callback, StdCall, StdCallLibrary.StdCallCallback
Enclosing interface:
Adl
public static interface Adl.AdlMallocCallback extends StdCallLibrary.StdCallCallback
ADL malloc callback: allocates memory and returns a pointer. Uses __stdcall per ADL SDK.
